summary: Iteration 21 - Certificate Design Module testing complete. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI functionality verified. The Certificate Designer module allows admins to create visual certificate templates with drag-drop designer supporting text elements, placeholder fields, images, signature blocks, and lines. Templates can be used to generate certificates for individual members (PDF) or bulk-generate for all paid event registrations (ZIP).
critical_code_review_comments: CertificatesAdmin.jsx: Properly uses API from AuthContext for all API calls
CertificatesAdmin.jsx: Stats cards correctly count templates by type (membership/event/custom)
CertificatesAdmin.jsx: Generate modal has two sections - Single Member Certificate (PDF) and Bulk Event Certificates (ZIP)
CertificatesAdmin.jsx: All template card actions (Edit, Preview, Generate, Clone, Delete) have proper data-testid attributes
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Canvas-based designer with drag-to-move and resize-from-corner functionality

CertificateDesigner.jsx: Properties panel shows element-specific properties (text content, font, size, color, alignment for text; signer name/title for signature blocks; line color/thickness for lines)
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Supports 5 element types: text, placeholder, image, signature_block, line
CertificateDesigner.jsx: 17 placeholder fields available including name, membership_id, date, event_title, etc.
Backend server.py (Lines 2582-2850): Complete CRUD endpoints for certificate templates with proper auth
Backend server.py: PDF generation using reportlab with proper font mapping and element positioning
Backend server.py: Bulk ZIP generation for event certificates with all paid registrations
seed_data_creation: Test templates created and cleaned up during backend and frontend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate Design Module fully functional. Templates list page shows stats cards (Total, Membership, Event/Conference, Custom) and template cards with Edit, Preview, Generate, Clone, Delete buttons. Designer page has toolbar with template name input, type dropdown (membership/event/custom), orientation dropdown (landscape/portrait), and element buttons (Text, Field, Image, Signature, Line). Canvas supports drag-to-move and resize-from-corner. Properties panel shows element-specific properties. Generate modal has two sections: Single Member Certificate (PDF download) with member search and dropdown, and Bulk Event Certificates (ZIP download) with event dropdown. All backend APIs working: list, create, get, update, delete, clone, preview, generate-member, generate-event.
